question: Hydrid
answer: Hybrid retrieval currently uses a source-plus-page key, which can collapse different chunks into one result when multiple chunks come from the same page. This should be standardized to avoid runtime confusion.

sources.content:
clear message asking for document upload first.
(cid:127) The upload schema was patched so Swagger renders the files field as binary file input
instead of plain string input.
3. Open Issues and Risks
(cid:127) Import paths are still mixed in some places between backend.* and src.backend.*. This
should be standardized to avoid runtime confusion.
(cid:127) Hybrid retrieval currently uses a source-plus-page key, which can collapse different
chunks into one result when multiple chunks come from the same page.
(cid:127) The hybrid score combination should be reviewed because FAISS scores may represent
distance, not direct similarity.
(cid:127) POST /ask can feel slow because each request runs retrieval and then a local Ollama
model inference step.
(cid:127) requirements.txt still appears to contain unresolved merge markers and should be
cleaned before broader environment setup.
4. Recommended Next Steps
(cid:127) Keep processor.py as the only ingest and splitting layer.
